languages.text: "Этот слуга Бога-Императора сражался отважно и беззаветно. Не продлевай его мучения — он заслужил Милость Императора за свою верность".

traits.locale_text: "Этот слуга Бога-Императора сражался отважно и беззаветно. Не продлевай его мучения — он заслужил Милость Императора за свою верность".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
languages.original_text: "Этот слуга Бога-Императора сражался отважно и беззаветно. Не продлевай его мучения — он заслужил Милость Императора за свою верность".

traits.locale_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
"This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
"This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
"This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."
"This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

languages.text: «Este siervo del Dios Emperador ha luchado con valor y con total devoción. No prolongue su sufrimiento. Su lealtad merece la misericordia del Emperador».
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: «Este siervo del Dios Emperador ha luchado con valor y con total devoción. No prolongue su sufrimiento. Su lealtad merece la misericordia del Emperador».

languages.text: “神皇的这位忠仆，已凭着无匹的英勇与全然的赤诚奋勇作战。莫要再延长他的苦痛。凭这份忠诚，帝皇的慈悲，已是他当之无愧的奖赏。”
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: “神皇的这位忠仆，已凭着无匹的英勇与全然的赤诚奋勇作战。莫要再延长他的苦痛。凭这份忠诚，帝皇的慈悲，已是他当之无愧的奖赏。”

languages.text: « Ce serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu a combattu valeureusement, avec un dévouement sans faille. Ne prolongez pas ses souffrances. Il mérite que vous lui accordiez la miséricorde de l'Empereur. »
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: « Ce serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu a combattu valeureusement, avec un dévouement sans faille. Ne prolongez pas ses souffrances. Il mérite que vous lui accordiez la miséricorde de l'Empereur. »

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un bu hizmetkârı, cesaretle ve tam bir bağlılıkla savaştı. Acısını uzatmayın. Sadakatiyle İmparator'un Merhameti'ni hak etti."
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un bu hizmetkârı, cesaretle ve tam bir bağlılıkla savaştı. Acısını uzatmayın. Sadakatiyle İmparator'un Merhameti'ni hak etti."

languages.text: "Dieser Diener des Gottimperators hat mit Tapferkeit und Hingabe gekämpft. Verlängert sein Leiden nicht. Er hat für seine Loyalität die Gnade des Imperators verdient."
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Diener des Gottimperators hat mit Tapferkeit und Hingabe gekämpft. Verlängert sein Leiden nicht. Er hat für seine Loyalität die Gnade des Imperators verdient."

languages.text: 「この神皇帝のしもべは勇気と献身をもって戦った。彼の苦しみは長くはならない。彼の忠誠心は皇帝の慈悲に値する。」
languages.original_text: "This servant of the God-Emperor fought with valour and utter devotion. Do not prolong his suffering. He has earned the Emperor's Mercy for his loyalty."

traits.locale_text: 「この神皇帝のしもべは勇気と献身をもって戦った。彼の苦しみは長くはならない。彼の忠誠心は皇帝の慈悲に値する。」
